description_long: This is a modern swivel chair featuring a sleek, contoured seat and backrest made from a glossy black material. The seat and back are smoothly integrated, forming a continuous S-shaped curve that provides ergonomic support. The chair is supported by a single, central metallic column that connects to a wide, circular metal base, ensuring stability and allowing for rotation. The base and support column have a brushed metal finish, contrasting with the high-gloss black seat. There are no visible armrests or adjustment levers, giving the chair a minimalist and streamlined appearance. The overall design is contemporary, making it suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or waiting areas.
description: A sleek, modern swivel chair with a glossy black contoured seat and a sturdy circular metal base. The design is minimalist, with no armrests or visible adjustment mechanisms.
description_view_0: Front view shows the smooth, curved black seat and backrest with the central support column and round metal base visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the S-shaped ergonomic curve of the seat and back, as well as the thickness of the materials.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad, rounded backrest and the full width of the circular base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the continuous curve of the seat and the central support structure.
attribute_central_support_column: A single, cylindrical metal column with a brushed finish, connecting the seat to a wide, flat circular base; appears fixed and sturdy.
attribute_seat_back_design: The seat back is tall, smoothly contoured, and integrated with the seat in a continuous S-curve, made of glossy black plastic with no visible patterns or cutouts.
